entity.summary: Alephium ecosystem decentralized exchange represented by a dedicated first-party domain and independently indexed exchange and DEX registry entries.
entity.notes: The dedicated first-party Elexium Finance domain is reachable. CoinGecko and DefiLlama candidate sources independently identify Elexium/Elexium Finance as an Alephium exchange and DEX. Confidence is medium because detailed public first-party documentation was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: Elexium Finance official website
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party Elexium Finance domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Elexium Finance exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus identifies Elexium Finance under the elexium.finance domain.

evidence.title: Elexium DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Elexium as an Alephium decentralized exchange; HEI consolidates Elexium and Elexium Finance naming under one entity.
